title: scrophularia ebulifolia var. schousboei
intro: Scrophularia ebulifolia var. schousboei, also known as East Asian figwort, is a plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of East Asian figwort include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. East Asian figwort can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia, often in combination with other herbs.
